message:
fix: Enforce domain boundary in iCloud URL detection pattern

Change iCloud detectPlatform regex from `(?:\/\/|\.)?` (optional boundary)
to `(?:\/\/|\.)` (required boundary).

This prevents subdomain spoofing attacks where URLs like `fakeicloud.com`
could match the pattern. The stricter check requires either `//` or `.`
before `icloud.com`, consistent with how Dropbox and other platform
patterns already work.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
